title: 妗滆姳璩炪伄寰屻伀銉昏姳闁嬨亸浜堝厗

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I raced in the Oka Sho! I'm a liiittle tired, but it
was a thrilling race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer thinks I did amazing too, which means I'm
sure to be fine! Time to get myself together!
Princess鈽咶orehead Flick!
